textByHash.050bc7c8274bc27e966db6950b1d538ad2f21083: A book about lighthouses? I love it! I actually have something you might be interested in as well...
textByHash.096c574269015f4faf9cbe1f1dc630f208240e9d: Look, you can see for yourself that the light has gone out, and the front door is locked up tight! He would NEVER do that!
textByHash.0994c8846a5437b71a9d8b4d2420243993b4e80f: as well as fix the bridge enough so that I can go and speak to my family in Rellekka and tell them whats happened, I will be eternally grateful!
textByHash.19d7710b528126ea21a3f3c3a49a8859a1c6d0b0: Oh... my poor darling Jossik... I just know something terrible has happened...
textByHash.27ec2b769a6a9baaa21c514184fdfd76af682497: Just use a plank on each side of the bridge. You will need a hammer, and thirty steel nails for each plank you use as well. I believe there are some planks near here...
textByHash.2bb19d3dae422b8b6afc98fdbec77d0b330aebeb: What? My cousin is the one who gave you my spare copy of the lighthouse key. Do you have memory problems, adventurer?
textByHash.2de5181bf0446d8512e4d82abc8b6c67aed47318: I'm sorry adventurer, I do not know anything about lighthouses.
textByHash.3308b074bb28803beab93c260635af66ec4c5ded: Please adventurer... We are both curious as to what has happened in that lighthouse, but you need to fix the bridge for me!
textByHash.3f018603e3913847ab7c28a4847afaea8158fe6b: I cannot bear to think that something bad may have happened to my darling Jossik...
textByHash.42933c723deb937227fa9344d04ffd90e4fe399b: Please, I know something terrible has happened to him... I can sense it! Please... please help me adventurer!
textByHash.460a03c818238b28d6cf57132bc0160e7d48e30e: Oh, please find my darling! I just know something horrible has happened!
textByHash.4a89c54ed2b4320d393a35754a30f7968874db80: With the light off this coastline is terribly dangerous to ships! And to lock the front door so that nobody can turn the light back on?
textByHash.51bb5f66b9b3c51c31c6599a8819ed9dcfa34927: But there is nothing at all. I am so worried...
textByHash.5227a3d690e75328b007f09d7c14bde76707d254: You MUST find a way to fix the lighthouse! The ships are in terrible danger as long as the light is not working properly!
textByHash.528e76392330e0bdd0c732599ee18473f9678658: Certainly. How much do you want?
textByHash.5f9af84952926d4c4cf4ad2e1b90f28957d59f45: My darling Jossik knew nothing about Lighthouses when he first came here, so the council must have left him some kind of manual or something.
textByHash.6987b6dc165383e78b5ad59ae87cb7a81282d182: Well, I am not just some helpless girl! I have pretty good agility, so you will only need to use two planks to make a ledge that I can balance along.
textByHash.722963101491ceff59cd6994d720e90fec547fcd: I don't exactly know where he has gone, but I am sure he went somewhere to practise his agility. If you see him, his name is Gunnjorn. Mention my name, he will recognise it.
textByHash.84421c740e17fce4afdd5a8e814ce89c9faa86e5: Thank you adventurer, but I need you to fix the bridge for me. The key to the lighthouse is of little comfort while I am trapped here on this causeway!
textByHash.88778c1a9a16c09a3aa2a4518631e4e5caa1aaae: Please adventurer... Do not let curiosity get the better of you! We Have to fix the lighthouse before any accidents happen!
textByHash.907788eb57872886a6cd519fdab65f84dbec3adb: OH! THANK YOU SO MUCH! I know my darling would never have left with the lighthouse lights off and without even telling me where he's gone!
textByHash.99db016576fab19d4de2dabbdab03baee9574f0d: Oh... it is terrible... horrible... My boyfriend lives here in this lighthouse, but I haven't seen him the last few days! I think something terrible has happened!
textByHash.abdbb79b40e69f0405d9934e9e9f60d26d374152: That is terribly irresponsible! He is far too thoughtful for that! He would never leave it unattended! He would also never leave without telling me!
textByHash.af15b0a33914d154306d0c7cf1e2ee2892da14c5: I have way too much of that paint for the lighthouse. If you want more of it, just ask!
textByHash.b23f73b16a09e7e6f2020e9c758e334a6e46e4bd: I came out here to see if I could find some sign of him...
textByHash.b6b46d0c659ce2fbd63a686170871ea21f5350f4: My cousin was always interested in agility. He left our home in Rellekka many moons ago, so that he could pursue this interest.
textByHash.babdd2e5d63fd5320c4c4b80157a695d57a02a31: Please find the key to the lighthouse for me though!
textByHash.bb1264d9516990dc027575144c22ba1b5e4b3296: Oh, thank Armadyl! I am in such a worry... please help me!
textByHash.c050c95e71723ed0e4a4f76a8c410e2e69042dc9: What?!?! You MUST save him! I beseech you, please! Do something!
textByHash.c07d1a03dc14467ec443cb6b0b26cb53e37f7ea7: It is terribly important that ships coming round this coastline do not crash here!
textByHash.c1ca237559a0b4edf444619f4ddebf7919cce283: Adventurer! You MUST do something about the broken light!
textByHash.cb6df45d1bd0f3e0de10516ea54f123101e6a748: What can have happened here? Please, you must fix the light, we cannot let my darling Jossik take the blame for any shipwrecks!
textByHash.ccdb55029e5508b024ce38b14dd1cff00c653448: That is wonderful news! But why does he not come up out of there?
textByHash.cec169d74372f7fd1d6114c4a10a22dd2b418f6f: Oh! Thank you so much for all of your help in rescuing my darling Jossik!
textByHash.d2e98e011a361930880588bcc29854aab9e399f9: Have you found any sign of my darling Jossik yet?
textByHash.d405e7a5f21af30fd9b7506c5df53802f8e22d8d: Now you can devote all of your energies to finding out what has happened to my darling Jossik!
textByHash.d60da06f07abc70e931295e32205babfda04a96c: Well, we have to do something to get the lighthouse working again! Also, as you may have noticed, the storm that knocked the bridge out
textByHash.f148e6b0c8130747416f0bcfc8e22989ed7202ec: I do not know what would have happened to him had you not chanced along this path!
textByHash.f589dc4917bc54203a1fa38fa03dd09122810960: Quickly, we must go inside and find out what has happened to my beloved Jossik!
textByHash.fc8e7b1cc4d58b24c8c98dfa97364c357173498d: I'm sure there must be some kind of user's guide around here somewhere though.
textByHash.ff17f305fbcc4c285b64ef5e6557effa8d37fbd7: has trapped me on this causeway! You seem to have got here okay somehow, so if you could go and visit my cousin and get the spare key I left him,
